title: Man's Waffle Expansion
description: Ever dreamed of making waffles? With Man's waffle expansion your dream becomes reality.
body:
Man's Waffle expansion is a small mod designed to add Waffles to Minecraft. Get your best waffle maker and prepare your best waffles.

 
 **This mod needs gecko libs.**
 
 Future updates will add more waffle varieties.
 
 Here's the list : 
 
- Classic Waffle [✅]
- Sweet Berry Waffle [✅]
- Sugar Waffle [✅]
- Chocolate Waffle [✅]
- Glow Berry Waffle [✅]
- Powdered sugar Waffle  [✅]
- Animated Block
- Chantilly Waffle [✅]
- chantilly [✅]
- NeoForge [✅]
- Chocolate [✅]
- Nether Update
- Ender Update
- Placable item [✅]
- New type of Waffle 

For the new waffles, I'll take the ones you suggest on Discord.

![discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a24013ad9d98b49b1682e0515a8a51477f2ccb1_0.webp)
